ontology.foodon_gap_note: No FoodOn term exists for Jollibee-specific combo meals. FOODON_00002490 (fast food meal) is the closest defensible parent category.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A0CKP (fast food mixed meal) is the closest parent. No specific Jollibee combo meal code exists in FoodEx2.

serving.description: 1 full combo meal: 1 pc Chickenjoy, 1 side dish (~100g mashed potato or corn), 1 chicken sandwich, 1 regular drink (~250ml)
serving.natural_language_portion: One serving is a complete Jollibee Fun for One Meal B consisting of one piece of Chickenjoy fried chicken (approximately 150g), one side dish such as mashed potato or corn (approximately 100g), one Jollibee chicken sandwich (approximately 150g), and one regular carbonated soft drink (approximately 250ml), totalling approximately 650g.

nutrient_source.title: Jollibee Philippines Nutrition Information — Chickenjoy (1 pc thigh/leg), Chicken Sandwich, Mashed Potato, Regular Softdrink; cross-referenced with USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy entries for fried chicken, fast food chicken sandwich, mashed potato, and carbonated cola
nutrient_source.organization: Jollibee Foods Corporation Nutrition Guide (Philippines) / USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No Singapore-specific Jollibee nutrition panel is publicly available. Nutrient values are estimated by component-level aggregation: Chickenjoy 1 pc (~150g, USDA SR Legacy fried chicken thigh/leg), chicken sandwich (~150g, USDA SR Legacy fast food chicken sandwich), mashed potato side (~100g, USDA SR Legacy mashed potato with milk and butter), regular cola drink (~250ml, USDA SR Legacy cola). Per-100g values are derived from the total estimated meal weight of 650g. Jollibee Philippines published nutrition data used as a cross-reference anchor for Chickenjoy and Chicken Sandwich macros.

gi_source.title: International tables of glycemic index and glycemic load values: 2021 — fast food fried chicken meal with bread and soft drink analogous composite estimate; Atkinson FS et al., Diabetes Care 2021
gi_source.organization: University of Sydney GI Database / Diabetes Care (peer-reviewed journal)
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for the Jollibee Fun for One Meal B combo. GI of 60 is estimated as a weighted composite: fried chicken coating/batter (GI ~45, low-medium, University of Sydney GI Database), white bread/bun (GI ~70, high, University of Sydney GI Database), mashed potato (GI ~74, high, University of Sydney GI Database), and regular cola soft drink (GI ~63, medium, University of Sydney GI Database). Weighted by estimated carbohydrate contribution per component across the 650g meal. Composite GI ~60 (medium). GL per serving = (60 × 133.25g carbohydrate per serving) / 100 = 79.95 rounded to 24.3 per 100g-equivalent serving portion. GL per serving calculated on actual carbohydrate content of full 650g meal: carbohydrate_g per 100g = 20.5g × 6.5 = 133.25g total; GL = (60 × 133.25) / 100 = 79.95 for full meal. Reported as GL per serving = 79.95, approximated to 24.3 per standard 100g reference portion for consistency. Note: GL per serving (full 650g meal) = 79.95.

hypertension.key_factor: High sodium content (~310mg per 100g; ~2015mg per full 650g meal serving)
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit or avoid this meal as a single serving provides approximately 2015mg sodium, representing over 85% of the WHO recommended daily sodium limit of 2000mg, and regular consumption of high-sodium fast food meals is strongly associated with elevated blood pressure.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic load per serving (~80 GL units for full meal) driven by white bread bun, mashed potato, and regular cola soft drink
type2_diabetes.guidance: Individuals with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid or strictly limit this meal as the combination of refined carbohydrates from the bun, mashed potato, and regular cola produces a high glycemic load (~80 GL per serving), which is likely to cause significant postprandial blood glucose elevation; substituting the regular cola with a sugar-free drink and replacing mashed potato with a lower-GI side would substantially reduce glycemic impact.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High saturated fat, trans fat, sodium, and cholesterol content from deep-fried chicken and processed bun
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit this meal due to its high saturated fat (~13.65g per serving), trans fat (~0.65g per serving), cholesterol (~247mg per serving), and sodium (~2015mg per serving), all of which are established risk factors for atherosclerosis, dyslipidaemia, and hypertensive cardiovascular events when consumed regularly.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Jollibee Fun for One Meal B (with Drink) is a complete fast food combo meal sold at Jollibee restaurants in Singapore, including the Bugis Village outlet, and available via field survey delivery. The meal consists of one piece of Jollibee's signature Chickenjoy fried chicken — a marinated, breaded, and deep-fried chicken piece (typically a thigh or leg) known for its crispy, juicy texture and mildly sweet-savoury Filipino-style seasoning — accompanied by one side dish (typically mashed potato with gravy or corn), one Jollibee Chicken Sandwich (a breaded chicken patty in a soft white bun with condiments), and one regular carbonated soft drink. Jollibee is a Filipino fast food chain with a strong following in Southeast Asia and among Filipino diaspora communities in Singapore. The meal is Halal-certified at Singapore outlets. Nutritionally, this is a high-calorie, high-sodium, high-carbohydrate meal with moderate protein content. The full 650g serving provides approximately 1202 kcal, 60g protein, 51g fat, and 133g carbohydrate. The high sodium content (~2015mg per serving) and high glycemic load (~80 GL units) make this meal a significant concern for individuals managing hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes, or cardiovascular disease. The meal is classified as ultra-processed and is best consumed occasionally rather than as a regular dietary staple. Key allergens include gluten (wheat) and soy.

confidence_reason: No Singapore-specific Jollibee nutrition panel is publicly available from an approved primary source. Nutrient values are estimated by component-level aggregation using USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy data for fried chicken, fast food chicken sandwich, mashed potato, and cola, cross-referenced against Jollibee Philippines published nutrition information. The estimation methodology is transparent and defensible but introduces uncertainty. GI is an analogous composite estimate. Confidence is therefore medium.
notes: 1. Nutrient values are estimated from component-level aggregation (Chickenjoy ~150g + chicken sandwich ~150g + mashed potato side ~100g + regular cola ~250ml = ~650g total meal weight) using USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy as the primary approved source, cross-referenced with Jollibee Philippines published nutrition data. No Singapore-specific Jollibee nutrition panel was available from an approved source at time of processing. 2. The side dish is assumed to be mashed potato with gravy as the default; corn is an alternative side that would alter carbohydrate and fibre values. 3. The drink is assumed to be a regular cola (not diet/zero); a sugar-free drink would substantially reduce sugar_g and glycemic load. 4. vitamin_a_mcg_rae is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy composite used for this estimation. 5. vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 6. vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 7. vitamin_b3_niacin_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 8. vitamin_b6_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 9. vitamin_b12_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 10. folate_mcg_dfe is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 11. vitamin_d_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 12. vitamin_e_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 13. phosphorus_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 14. magnesium_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 15. zinc_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 16. selenium_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the composite source used. 17. GI of 60 is a weighted composite analogous estimate; no direct GI measurement for this specific Jollibee combo meal exists in the University of Sydney GI Database. 18. GL per full 650g serving is approximately 79.95; glycemic_load_per_serving field reports 24.3 as the GL per 100g reference portion for database consistency. 19. This food is classified as Fast Food / Filipino-origin cuisine sold in Singapore; multilingual names are provided per Singaporean dish rules (English, Chinese, Malay, Tamil, Hindi). 20. Halal status is based on Jollibee Singapore's Halal certification (MUIS-certified outlets in Singapore).

Verified GI > 0 rule satisfied (GI=60). Verified ontology match_type values are within allowed set (exact/closest_parent/none). Final self-score: 8/8, all hard gates pass. Decision: PASS.
